visual_identity.image_negative_prompt_global: readable text, letters, logo, watermark, cheap sci-fi look, generic futuristic interface, random cinematic people, oversaturated colors, low quality, blurry, distorted screens, malformed UI, cartoonish rendering

items.landing_copy_focus: CID como centro operativo inteligente para cine y produccion audiovisual
items.image_intent: Plataforma central de produccion audiovisual con IA y pipeline completo.
items.image_prompt: the image must clearly communicate: a central AI-powered audiovisual production platform for cinema, shown as a real control center that connects script, storyboard, planning, image generation, post-production and final delivery; single clear visual metaphor: one premium cinematic operations room as the brain of the entire pipeline; avoid generic futuristic interface; avoid random cinematic people unless the block requires team/studio; composition designed for website landing section background; dark cinematic premium technology style; no readable text; show multiple connected production surfaces with clear hierarchy so the viewer immediately understands this is the main platform and not a random tech room
items.image_negative_prompt: abstract technology wallpaper, empty control room, spaceship bridge, random holograms

items.landing_copy_focus: Flujos desconectados entre guion, storyboard, produccion y post
items.image_intent: Departamentos desconectados, materiales separados y caos organizado.
items.image_prompt: the image must clearly communicate: fragmented audiovisual production with disconnected departments, isolated screens, separated script pages, storyboard materials and post-production references that do not connect to each other; single clear visual metaphor: one production workspace divided into disconnected islands; avoid generic futuristic interface; avoid random cinematic people unless the block requires team/studio; composition designed for website landing section background; dark cinematic premium technology style; no readable text; show organized chaos and visible separation between tools so it never looks like a beautiful centralized control interface
items.image_negative_prompt: centralized dashboard, elegant orchestration hub, smooth connected lines, clean unified system

items.landing_copy_focus: La IA analiza guion, personajes y escenas antes de proponer imagen
items.image_intent: Analisis de guion, personajes, localizaciones, escenas y planos recomendados.
items.image_prompt: the image must clearly communicate: a screenplay being analyzed into characters, locations, scenes, technical breakdown and recommended shots before image generation; single clear visual metaphor: one structured analysis board built from script intelligence; avoid generic futuristic interface; avoid random cinematic people unless the block requires team/studio; composition designed for website landing section background; dark cinematic premium technology style; no readable text; the scene must feel like reasoning and structure, not image generation, not project management, and not abstract data art
items.image_negative_prompt: image generation nodes, glowing render output, abstract charts, code rain, random analytics wallpaper

items.landing_copy_focus: ComfyUI como motor visual controlado dentro del pipeline
items.image_intent: Nodos visuales conectados generando un frame cinematografico.
items.image_prompt: the image must clearly communicate: a node-based visual workflow generating a cinematic frame in a controlled way; single clear visual metaphor: connected nodes feeding one premium film frame as output; avoid generic futuristic interface; avoid random cinematic people unless the block requires team/studio; composition designed for website landing section background; dark cinematic premium technology style; no readable text; the image must look unmistakably like image creation through connected nodes, not script analysis, not operations management and not random abstract screens
items.image_negative_prompt: script analysis board, delivery suite, generic control center, abstract neon geometry

items.landing_copy_focus: CID conecta todas las fases del pipeline audiovisual
items.image_intent: Sistema central conectando guion, analisis, storyboard, concept art, produccion y delivery.
items.image_prompt: the image must clearly communicate: one central system orchestrating script, analysis, storyboard, concept art, production and delivery modules; single clear visual metaphor: a central operational core with visible connected modules around it; avoid generic futuristic interface; avoid random cinematic people unless the block requires team/studio; composition designed for website landing section background; dark cinematic premium technology style; no readable text; it must feel like orchestration and flow management, with every module visibly linked to the center and easy to understand at a glance
items.image_negative_prompt: fragmented desk, random node editor, empty server room, decorative abstract tunnel

items.landing_copy_focus: Continuidad visual y trabajo por escenas dentro del storyboard
items.image_intent: Paneles de storyboard, secuencia de planos y continuidad visual.
items.image_prompt: the image must clearly communicate: storyboard panels arranged as a sequence of shots with visual continuity between them; single clear visual metaphor: one premium storyboard board showing multiple connected cinematic panels; avoid generic futuristic interface; avoid random cinematic people unless the block requires team/studio; composition designed for website landing section background; dark cinematic premium technology style; no readable text; it must never look like a single hero image or isolated frame, and must clearly read as previsualization planning
items.image_negative_prompt: single cinematic still, abstract poster, analysis dashboard, empty pinboard

items.landing_copy_focus: Direccion artistica, concept art y exploracion de key visuals
items.image_intent: Moodboard, key visual y material artistico vendible.
items.image_prompt: the image must clearly communicate: a cinematic key visual and moodboard exploration for a film world, presented as premium concept art development; single clear visual metaphor: one art department board centered around a striking sellable key visual; avoid generic futuristic interface; avoid random cinematic people unless the block requires team/studio; composition designed for website landing section background; dark cinematic premium technology style; no readable text; this should be the most artistic and commercially attractive image, clearly more like concept art than analysis or management
items.image_negative_prompt: office collaboration scene, random data UI, fragmented desk, generic wallpaper

items.landing_copy_focus: Equipos reales de productoras, estudios y coordinacion
items.image_intent: Equipo profesional revisando materiales en un estudio moderno.
items.image_prompt: the image must clearly communicate: a real professional production team inside a modern studio reviewing audiovisual materials together; single clear visual metaphor: one calm collaboration table facing premium review screens; avoid generic futuristic interface; composition designed for website landing section background; dark cinematic premium technology style; no readable text; because this block requires team/studio, include only a small believable group of professionals engaged in real review and decision-making, never random glamorous actors or startup coworking scenes
items.image_negative_prompt: generic startup office, smiling stock team, party environment, empty room

items.landing_copy_focus: Trazabilidad, supervision y control profesional frente a herramientas aisladas
items.image_intent: Sistema profesional con trazabilidad, capas, control y supervision.
items.image_prompt: the image must clearly communicate: a professional production intelligence system with traceability, supervision, layered control and human oversight; single clear visual metaphor: visible layered oversight rails passing through one premium system; avoid generic futuristic interface; avoid random cinematic people unless the block requires team/studio; composition designed for website landing section background; dark cinematic premium technology style; no readable text; it can be a technology metaphor, but it must feel specific to control and traceability rather than a generic abstract background
items.image_negative_prompt: random abstract wallpaper, decorative neon lines, blockchain art, sci-fi tunnel

items.landing_copy_focus: Cierre operativo, validacion y entrega final del paquete audiovisual
items.image_intent: Sala de finishing, QC y entrega final.
items.image_prompt: the image must clearly communicate: a professional finishing, quality control and final delivery suite with approval-ready monitors and a sense of master handoff; single clear visual metaphor: one final delivery room at the end of the pipeline; avoid generic futuristic interface; avoid random cinematic people unless the block requires team/studio; composition designed for website landing section background; dark cinematic premium technology style; no readable text; it must feel like trustworthy professional closure and not like a control center, concept art board or abstract tech scene
items.image_negative_prompt: early concept phase, storyboard board, node editor, chaotic review room
